subtitle: The Social Impact Art Gallery is an artistic and theoretical project run by Hawk Stars NGO for Education, Innovation and Social Development, with professional curators Romy Castro, Plastic/Visual Artist and Researcher, and Sofia F. Augusto, Architect and Visual Artist. Its aim is to contribute to the funding of various social projects promoted by Hawk Stars, in order to socially develop the interior of the country.
description_1: The Social Impact Art Gallery's primary aim is to promote the arts and artists. At the same time as promoting artists, it also aims to make a financial contribution, through the sale of works of art, to the reconstruction of the building that will house the International Training Center as part of the Global Village Project of the NGO Hawk Stars, which will take place in the city of Pinhel, in the district of Guarda, Portugal.
description_2: Once this goal has been achieved, the Art Gallery will continue to exist as a Crowdfunding platform to finance other possible social impact projects.
